Appearances:
Plaintiff, Abraham Faragis present. Represented by Laura Gingher
Attorney, Brenda Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Kenneth Smith, is present.
Attorney, Joel Willard, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Gary Louie, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-07-2010 is vacated.
